title: rubus vallisparsus
intro: Rubus vallisparsus, also known as the Black Raspberry Bramble, is a species of bramble native to eastern North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Rubus vallisparsus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health, while also exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. The herbal preparations of Rubus vallisparsus typically include infusions, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
